description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in CzarNews 1.14 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the (1) usern or (2) passw parameters to (a) cn_auth.php, (3) s parameter to (b) news.php, or (4) a parameter to (c) dpost.php.
